recommendations.title: Inheritance
recommendations.overview: The patriarch of a wealthy and powerful family suddenly passes away, leaving his wife and daughter with a shocking secret inheritance that threatens to unravel and destroy their lives.

recommendations.title: Every Breath You Take
recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist, whose client commits suicide, finds his family life disrupted after introducing her surviving brother to his wife and daughter.

recommendations.title: Terminal
recommendations.genres: Crime, Drama, Thriller, Action, Comedy, Mystery
recommendations.overview: In the dark heart of a sprawling, anonymous city, two assassins carry out a sinister mission, a teacher battles a fatal illness, and an enigmatic janitor and a curious waitress lead dangerous double lives.  Murderous consequences unravel in the dead

recommendations.title: Return
recommendations.overview: A young couple purchase their new home to start a life together, only to find out the elderly couple next door have other plans for them.

recommendations.title: Las sirvientas calientes 4
recommendations.overview: When a millionaire becomes a widower, he decides to start looking for a woman through the apps on his phone, not knowing that he has to be very careful for that.

recommendations.title: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple
recommendations.overview: Dr. Kelson finds himself in a shocking new relationship - with consequences that could change the world as they know it - and Spike's encounter with Jimmy Crystal becomes a nightmare he can't escape.

recommendations.title: Villains

recommendations.title: The Ones Below
recommendations.overview: A young affluent couple expecting their first child hits it off with the new couple that moves in downstairs, until a dinner party between them ends in a shocking accident.

recommendations.title: Left-Handed Girl
recommendations.overview: A mother and her two daughters move to Taipei to open a noodle stand at a vibrant night market, but family secrets and tradition test their fresh start.

recommendations.title: The Exorcism of Carmen Farias
recommendations.overview: Carmen, a brave journalist, discovers soon after her mother's death that she has inherited her grandma's house. She decides to move there without knowing it hides dark secrets.
